response.justification: Candidate is an accomplished full-stack software engineer with strong web, mobile, and DLang systems experience, but the role requires deep hardware-software co-design expertise: SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator performance analysis, GPU/SIMD/MIMD architecture, and deep neural network optimization. The resume shows no evidence of silicon modeling, accelerator architecture work, or DNN training/inference optimization, and the educational path (BS + ~20 years experience meets the minimum bar) does not compensate for the missing domain specialization.
strengths: Long tenure with low-latency, high-throughput systems (Sociomantic) using async I/O and DLang
Broad polyglot background spanning embedded, backend, and systems-level work
Meets the BS + 8+ years experience threshold for the educational requirement
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, or silicon performance analysis experience
No demonstrated work on AI accelerators, GPUs, SIMD/MIMD, or DNN training/inference optimization
Career trajectory is full-stack/web product engineering, not principal-level hardware architecture

key_factors.factor: Missing AI accelerator / SoC modeling expertise
No GPU / SIMD / MIMD / DNN optimization background
Low-latency systems and DLang experience at Sociomantic
